store.name: Recovery Shelf
store.tagline: Home aftercare kits for outpatient surgery days
store.positioning: Practical non-prescription supplies organized around comfort, hygiene, access, and routine for planned recovery at home.

collections.name: Procedure-prep kits
collections.description: Scenario-based kits for the first days and weeks at home after planned procedures.

collections.name: Bathing and hygiene support
collections.description: Shower protection, gentle cleansing, stability, and reach tools for less stressful washing routines.

collections.name: Sleep and positioning
collections.description: Pillows, trays, caddies, and reach tools for rest setups when movement is limited.

collections.name: Dressing and body access
collections.description: Front-closure clothing, robe layers, soft waist pants, and recovery garment care.

collections.name: Tracking and organization
collections.description: Medication timing, note pads, label sheets, pill organizers, appointment folders, and checklist magnets.

collections.name: Comfort and skin basics
collections.description: Cold packs, wraps, fragrance-free barrier balm, lip care, dry-mouth aids, and bedding protectors.

products.name: First 72 Hours at Home Kit
products.summary: Bedside caddy, timing cards, cold packs, cleansing cloths, label sheets, and supply tray for the first days at home.

products.name: Dental Surgery Soft-Care Kit
products.summary: Dry-mouth aids, lip care, cold packs, and simple soft-food tools for dental procedure recovery routines.

products.name: Dermatology Dressing-Change Kit
products.summary: Gentle wash, label sheets, supply tray, barrier balm, and note pad for organized dressing changes.

products.name: Abdominal Comfort Setup
products.summary: Loose access layers, positioning pillows, lap tray, and reacher support for low-effort movement at home.

products.name: Breast & Chest Recovery Layer Kit
products.summary: Front-closure shirt, robe layer, compression-friendly camisole, and laundry bag for delicate recovery garments.

products.name: Caregiver Restock Pack
products.summary: Consumable refills, handoff pad, checklist magnet, and label sheets for helpers maintaining a recovery corner.

products.name: Waterproof Shower Sleeve Pair
products.summary: Reusable sleeve coverage for shower routines when keeping an area dry matters.

products.name: Incline Wedge Pillow Set
products.summary: Supportive wedge with washable cover and matching knee pillow for planned rest setups.

products.name: Front-Closure Recovery Shirt
products.summary: Soft shirt layer designed for easier dressing when overhead movement is uncomfortable.

products.name: Medication Timing Card Pack
products.summary: Readable cards for timing routines, caregiver notes, appointment reminders, and fridge checklists.

products.name: Reusable Cold Pack Trio
products.summary: Three fabric-sleeved packs sized for rotating comfort support during home recovery routines.
